metadata.title: Server LM — Documents at your service
metadata.description: Chat with your documents and give precise context to your AI agents. Multi-tenant RAG infrastructure, ready to use, configurable in natural language.

hero.headlineAccent: Give precise context to your agents.

zeroSetup.descripcion: No migrating files. No reorganizing anything. No configuring pipelines. Select your directories and Server LM takes care of reading, indexing and vectorizing — and keeping it all up to date.
zeroSetup.bullet0: PDF, Word, Excel, text: processed right where they are
zeroSetup.bullet1: Incremental indexing: detects changes and reindexes only what's new

dosFormas.eyebrow: Two ways to use Server LM
dosFormas.descripcion: The same platform that lets you chat with your documents is the layer that delivers any AI agent the exact document context it needs.
dosFormas.cardADesc: For professionals, teams and companies with large document volumes. Ask in natural language and get answers with citations, without browsing folders or opening files one by one.
dosFormas.cardAB1: Answers with verifiable citations to your source files
dosFormas.cardBTitulo: Give precise context to your AI agents
dosFormas.cardBDesc: Giving an agent context is no longer just for technical profiles: from a professional building their own agent without code to consultancies and integrators building for third parties. Server LM hands you the hard part solved — ingestion, vectors and security.
dosFormas.cardBB0: Turnkey RAG engine: scans, vectorizes and indexes for you
dosFormas.cardBB1: Semantic database ready to feed your agent
dosFormas.cardBB2: Multi-tenant, secure and configurable by prompts

enBreve.a0: Ready-to-use multi-tenant RAG infrastructure: chat with your documents in natural language and give any AI agent the exact documental context it needs, filtered by RBAC.
enBreve.a1: For professionals, teams, companies and holdings working with large volumes of documents; and for developers building AI agents who need documental context solved.
enBreve.a2: Point Server LM at your documents directory; the system scans, vectorizes and indexes them automatically. Then you query by meaning and get answers with citations to the source.
enBreve.a3: Professional USD $7.99/mo, Team USD $49.99/mo, Business USD $199/mo, Enterprise USD $1,990/mo and Corporate custom. 15-day free trial, no payment method required.

textFill: Ask questions of your contracts, reports and procedures. Get answers with verifiable citations. Define the rules in natural language — no programmers, without your data leaving.

problema.tituloAccent: The hard part is finding it.
problema.descripcion: Teams accumulate thousands of contracts, reports, minutes, regulations, procedures and emails. The problem isn't the lack of information — it's that it's scattered and hard to use.
problema.sin1: Opening documents one by one to read the content
problema.sin2: Manually copying and pasting text to compare
problema.sin3: Information that "everyone knows exists but no one can find"
problema.sin4: Risk of confidential documents reaching the wrong people
problema.con0: Ask in natural language and get an answer in seconds
problema.con1: Semantic search that connects related documents
problema.con2: Comparisons, summaries and analysis in a single message
problema.con3: The system reads and connects all the information automatically
problema.con4: Strict permission control: each user sees only their own

capacidades.titulo1: It's not a file search engine. It's an assistant that
capacidades.item0Desc: Summarizes documents, answers specific questions, cites exact text, compares contracts, extracts key clauses.
capacidades.item1Desc: Extracts entities, deadlines and risks. Detects contradictions, builds timelines and identifies technical terms.
capacidades.item2Desc: Generates drafts of emails, minutes, reports, checklists, comparison tables and formal replies.
capacidades.item3Desc: Supports decision-making with compliance analysis, pros and cons, and identifies missing information.
capacidades.item4Desc: Creates thematic workspaces, groups documents by concept and suggests automatic tags and classifications.
capacidades.item5Desc: Creates glossaries, introductory explanations or summaries of the document corpus for inductions and onboarding.

comoFunciona.subtitulo: Vector semantic search — AI that understands the meaning of your documents, not just their words.
comoFunciona.paso0Desc: Your files never leave where they are. Server LM only indexes their metadata and meaning — PDF, Word, Excel or text — so it can operate on them.
comoFunciona.paso1Desc: Extracts the text, splits it into fragments and creates a semantic base. Each fragment is ready to be found by concept.
comoFunciona.paso2Desc: Ask directly in plain language —"Give me the active contracts"— or let your own agents query for you.
comoFunciona.paso3Desc: A precise answer via semantic search, citing the source files. In the chat or served straight to your agents.

paraAgentes.descripcion: Server LM exposes its documental knowledge as context for external agents via MCP, CLI and REST API —always filtered by RBAC. These are the available operations; the full catalog is published in machine-readable format.

seguridad.descripcion: Server LM was designed from the start on the premise that confidential documents must remain under your organization's control.
seguridad.punto0: Data encrypted at rest in the database (AES-256)
seguridad.punto1: Internal operation only via APIs: no possibility of injecting malicious prompts
seguridad.punto2: «On the fly» indexing: documents are not uploaded to the cloud
seguridad.punto3: Structural filtering from the database: each access goes through views that filter what each user can see
seguridad.punto5: Two-factor authentication and secure JWT tokens
seguridad.punto6: Role-based access control (RBAC) with granular permissions by function and profile
seguridad.punto7: Full audit: every action logged with user, date and module
seguridad.punto9: Optional Client LM: indexing never leaves the client's internal network

planes.titulo: A plan for every organization size.
planes.plan1F3: Access control by area or profile
planes.plan1F4: Each member sees only their area
planes.plan2F3: Client LM: indexing never leaves your network
planes.plan2F4: AI choice: Claude, GPT, Gemini, open source
planes.plan2F5: Granular permissions by role, function and profile

porQueNosotros.item0Desc: Use it to chat with your documents today, or as a source of precise context for your AI agents tomorrow — without redoing ingestion, vectorization or security.
porQueNosotros.item1Desc: From an independent professional to a corporation with dozens of entities, hierarchical levels and privacy requirements. The same system grows with you.
porQueNosotros.item2Desc: Compatible with Claude (Anthropic), GPT (OpenAI), Gemini (Google) and open source models. You're not tied to a single provider.
porQueNosotros.item3Desc: Ready-to-use SaaS. You only need to upload documents and configure users — no own infrastructure on Personal, Team and Enterprise plans.

cta.titulo: Interested in Server LM for your work, team, company or as a source of context for your AI agents?
cta.subtitulo: Contact us for a free, no-commitment demo. 15 days free, no payment method required.

footer.tagline: Documents at your service. Intelligent document management platform.
